scripts.build: chant build src --lexicon aws -o templates/infra.json && chant build src --lexicon k8s -o k8s.yaml
scripts.deploy-infra: aws cloudformation deploy --template-file templates/infra.json --stack-name eks-microservice --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM --region ${AWS_REGION:-us-east-1} --parameter-overrides domainName=${DOMAIN:-api.eks-microservice-demo.dev} publicAccessCidr=${CIDR:-0.0.0.0/0}
scripts.status: kubectl get pods -n microservice && kubectl get ingress -n microservice && kubectl get daemonsets -n amazon-cloudwatch && kubectl get daemonsets -n amazon-metrics
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy-infra && npm run configure-kubectl && npm run load-outputs && npm run build:k8s && npm run apply && npm run wait && npm run status
